title: Aomig Bath Crayons, 6 Colors Bathtub Toys for Painting in Bathtub, Bath Toys for Kids Washable Paint, Easy Clean Markers, Entertain Kids
features: SAFE & NON-TOXIC: Bath crayons are made of safe and environmentally friendly materials, specially designed for children, durable, non-toxic and harmless, ensuring the safety of children when using them

KIDS BATH TOY: The bath crayons are cleverly designed in a pen shape, which is convenient for small hands to grasp, and can also be conveniently placed in a plastic box for easy storage. The height of the telescopic crayons can also be adjusted as needed

EASY TO CLEAN OFF: The washable baby bath crayons are made specifically for use on smooth and glossy surfaces like bathtubs, bathroom tiles, and even on the children's body. Easily washes off using a sponge or any damp cloth

THE IDEAL GIFT FOR LITTLE ONES: This bath crayon is not only suitable for bathroom graffiti, but can also be used for daily painting or performance. It is a good helper for children's learning and entertainment
BATH TOY CRAYONS: This set of colourful children's bath toy crayons includes 6/12 long-lasting bath crayons to encourage active play
description: Product description Product Description Bath crayons perfect size for little hands to grasp Easily washes off bath walls with a damp cloth or sponge Draw on tile/porcelain or other smooth surfaces Encourages creativity, colour recognition and imaginative play. Bathroom crayon perfect for enhancing motor skills, these bath crayons allow children to express themselves creatively while having fun. These washable bath crayons make an ideal birthday gift or holiday surprise, they'll love showing off their new drawing tools and getting creative in the tub. Our scribble and wipe bath crayons set encourages fun by allowing toddlers to write numbers, letters, and shapes during their bath time. This help develop creativity, colour recognition and imaginative play. The washable baby bath crayons are made specifically for use on smooth and glossy surfaces like bathtubs, bathroom tiles, and even on the children's body. Easily washes off using a sponge or any damp cloth. Directions 1. Submerge the crayons in water to make them usable. 2. Draw on suitable surfaces with the crayons. 3. Clean the crayons off after use with a damp cloth or sponge. Material: Plastic Product Type: Bath Crayons Colour: Multicolor Package Contents: 6/12 x Bathroom Crayon Safety Warning NO
